description_long: This is a military-grade, armored combat tactical vehicle with a robust olive-green exterior and angular, reinforced body panels. The vehicle features four large, off-road tires with deep treads, a spare tire mounted at the rear, and a camouflaged canvas cover over the cargo area. The front is equipped with a heavy-duty grille guard, two prominent antennas, and white diagonal stripes painted across the hood. Side doors are reinforced and display a red and white insignia, while the rear includes additional storage containers. The overall design emphasizes protection, mobility, and utility for urban and rugged environments.
description: Armored olive-green combat tactical vehicle with reinforced panels, off-road tires, and a camouflaged rear cargo cover. Features military markings, heavy-duty grille, and visible antennas.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, four large tires, camouflaged rear cover, and red and white insignia on the door.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the spare tire, camouflaged cargo cover, and rear storage containers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features as view 0, including the insignia and visible antenna.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the heavy-duty grille guard, white diagonal hood stripes, and dual front windows.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body visible armor plating with reinforced, angular panels on the doors, hood, and sides; thickness appears substantial, with sloped surfaces for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive green with a camouflaged fabric cover at the rear and white diagonal stripes on the hood.
attribute_military_markings: Red and white insignia on both side doors.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep tread pattern and one rear-mounted spare; tires appear reinforced.
